basic_details.short_information: The Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital (DDUH) has officially announced the Senior Resident (Adhoc) Recruitment 2026 with 7 vacancies under Advertisement No. F2S (01)/DDUH/SR/2026/12173-76. Candidates holding a Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/Diploma equivalent) in the relevant specialty or having 3 years of post-MBBS experience with at least 2 years in the concerned department are eligible to apply. The maximum age limit is 45 years, with applicable relaxations for reserved categories. Selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,08,700 per month. application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 45 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC (Non Creamy Layer) (Delhi)

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in the respective specialty or 3 years post MBBS Experience with at least 02 years in the respective department.
qualification.details: Anesthesia: Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Anaesthesia or 3 years post MBBS experience with at least 02 years in Anaesthesia department. Pathology: Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Pathology. Obs. & Gynae: Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Obs & Gynae. In Case of non-availability of MD/MS/DNB/DIPLOMA Candidate, then Candidates who have 3 years post MBBS Experience with at least 02 years in Obs & Gynae department will be considered for the post.

salary_details.details: Senior Resident (Adhoc): As per 7th CPC pay matrix level 11 (Rs 67,700/- to Rs 2,08,700/-) and other admissible allowances per month.

rows.deen_dayal_upadhyay_hospital_dduh: Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in the respective specialty or 3 years post MBBS Experience with at least 02 years in the respective department.
Max 45 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC)

content_sections.heading: DDUH Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DDUH Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DDUH Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DDUH Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Anesthesia: Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Anaesthesia or 3 years post MBBS experience with at least 02 years in Anaesthesia department. Pathology: Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Pathology. Obs. & Gynae: Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in Obs & Gynae. In Case of non-availability of MD/MS/DNB/DIPLOMA Candidate, then Candidates who have 3 years post MBBS Experience with at least 02 years in Obs & Gynae department will be considered for the post.

content_sections.heading: DDUH Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: DDUH Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC (Non Creamy Layer) (Delhi)

content_sections.heading: DDUH Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Senior Resident (Adhoc): As per 7th CPC pay matrix level 11 (Rs 67,700/- to Rs 2,08,700/-) and other admissible allowances per month.

rows.event: Walk-in Interview for Anesthesia (if vacancies remain)
Walk-in Interview for Obs. & Gynae (if vacancies remain)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for DDUH Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DDUH Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The primary walk-in date for most posts is 25th June 2026. There are also subsequent dates if vacancies remain.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA equivalent) in the respective specialty or 3 years of post-MBBS experience with at least 2 years in the relevant department.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST (5 years) and OBC (3 years).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary is as per the 7th CPC pay matrix level 11, ranging from Rs 67,700/- to Rs 2,08,700/- per month, plus other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Senior Resident (Adhoc) positions across various specialties.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to appear directly for the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Which specialties are recruiting Senior Residents?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Senior Residents in Anesthesia, Pathology, and Obs. & Gynae.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital, New Delhi - 110064.
